site.name: hd-tea
site.tagline: A working atlas of tea: origins, craft, and the table.

library.title: The Library
library.desc: Every tea and tisane on the shelf, keyed by the color in the cup.

origins.title: Origins
origins.desc: The places tea comes from: countries, mountains, gardens, and the terroir that shapes each cup.

craft.title: The Craft
craft.desc: How tea is made: the plant, the pluck, the factory floor, and the years in storage.

table.title: The Table
table.desc: How tea is brewed, tasted, and served: water, vessels, technique, and the vocabulary of the palate.

teas.label: Teas
teas.desc: Individual teas from the six types.

cultivation.label: Cultivation
cultivation.desc: The plant, the garden, and the growing year.

storage.label: Storage
storage.desc: Keeping tea well, from tins to aging rooms.

tasting.label: Tasting
tasting.desc: Method and vocabulary for reading a cup.

teaware.label: Teaware
teaware.desc: Vessels and tools, and what they change.
